ai_profile:
**Pinkpop 2026: A Vibrant Fusion of Sounds and Styles**  
Taking place from June 19 to 21, Pinkpop 2026 promises an eclectic mix of genres and global talent with 32 artists gracing its stages. The lineup leans heavily toward Alternative Rock (8 acts), Pop (7), and Indie Rock (6), with splashes of Electropop, Punk, and even Symphonic Pop rounding out the diverse musical palette. With every act boasting Spotify links, fans can easily dive into the sounds of this dynamic festival.

The festival showcases a strong international presence, with artists hailing from the United Kingdom and United States (9 each), alongside notable representation from the Netherlands (7) and other nations like Germany, Canada, and Australia. This multinational lineup highlights Pinkpop’s commitment to celebrating music from around the world. Gender diversity is also in focus, with eight female-led acts and four mixed-gender groups, though the majority of performers remain male. However, representation among people of color is limited, with only one artist or act identifying as such.

With an average artist rating of 6.88 and a solid 100% rating and Spotify coverage, Pinkpop 2026 is set to deliver a well-rounded experience for festivalgoers. The majority of acts fall into the 7-8 rating range, suggesting a lineup packed with solid, crowd-pleasing performances. Fans can expect a celebration of both familiar and emerging talent, making this year’s edition a must-attend for music lovers across genres.
